candidates.why: Labeled as revenue component but appears incomplete and likely not the primary consolidated top-line; aggregate revenue line exists.
Another revenue component; still not the full top-line as there is a more comprehensive revenue/other income total.
Specific type of revenue but not the main consolidated revenue figure; also appears unused in preview.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as top-line.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The true top-line appears to be 'Total revenue and other income', which aggregates operating revenues and other income. None of the provided REVT candidates represents the full top-line; they are components or non-operating (e.g., 'Financial income'). Therefore I selected the more comprehensive non-candidate label and flagged for manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Total revenue and other income

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and consumables used and services expense
candidates.why: Direct costs of materials and services; matches COGS concept and ties numerically to gross profit.
Also describes direct costs but only populated in earliest year; appears to be older-period COGS label.
Operating overhead, not direct production cost; belongs in SG&A, not COGS.
Explicit SG&A bucket, not COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and consumables used and services expense

variables.notes: Chosen as the main direct cost of revenues; it matches the Cost of Revenues - Total amounts and is the appropriate COGS line. Totals are avoided in favor of this component label per instructions.

candidates.why: Broad personnel/overhead expense, typical SG&A component (excluding COGS).

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A stock-based compensation; should be included as SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A labor component; clearly part of overhead.
Operating overhead bucket (includes advertising, rent, restructuring); fits SG&A.
Explicit SG&A bucket; although values are nan in the preview, line existence implies non-missing in some years. Per rules, include it as an SG&A component line.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling General & Administrative Expenses
Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No single populated SG&A total exists, so multiple overhead components are selected: explicit SG&A line plus personnel-related and other operating expenses, including SG&A-specific stock-based comp and labor. Totals or balancing items were intentionally excluded.
No research & development expense line (or reasonable proxy) is present in the provided Income Statement. R&D appears to be either non-existent or immaterially disclosed, so XRD is set to 0.

candidates.why: Core interest expense on debt; primary choice for XINT.
Interest component of lease liabilities; valid interest expense if main line is missing.
Generic interest expense supplemental line; useful if detailed lines are missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; use only if primary interest lines are unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list: core debt interest first, then lease interest, then generic/supplemental lines as fallbacks, all from the Income Statement. Non-controlling interest and loan balance sheet items were not used, as they are not expenses.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not the total; BE should use a total equity measure when available.
Represents total shareholders' equity; best available proxy for book equity given the separate non-controlling interest line.
Duplicate total equity label; same concept as 'Total equity'.

variables.notes: 'Total equity' is used as book equity. A separate 'Non-controlling interest' line exists (though currently nan), so using the overall total for BE and the dedicated NCI line for MIB avoids double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not the balance sheet equity amount; less suitable than the balance sheet line for MIB.
Balance sheet line for minority interests; appropriate measure for MIB in equity denominator.
Income statement minority interest; again, not the equity stock amount.

variables.notes: Mapped to the balance sheet 'Non-controlling interest' line, which represents the equity attributable to minority shareholders. Income-statement minority interest lines were not used to avoid mixing flows with stock variables.
